title: Option to switch chat message order from latest to oldest in updates section
excerpt: Can we please have the option to switch order of the oldest to the latest messages/updates in the updates section. This way you can easily track communication from the very start of a discussion and move to the latest me…

posts.author: Dian94 (Dian Maritz)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we please have the option to switch order of the oldest to the latest messages/updates in the updates section. This way you can easily track communication from the very start of a discussion and move to the latest messages in descending order. Currently you can only see the latest messages at the top and descend to oldest messages.

posts.author: PaulaS (Paula Shelton)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, please! Scrolling to the bottom of the comments in the Updates Section is inefficient and out-dated. We should be able to see the most recent comment at the top.
